title: TARDIS Resource Pack
description: Texture and sound resource pack for the TARDIS plugin
body:
This is the companion resource pack for the [TARDIS plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/tardis).

It contains textures and sounds for the custom items, monsters and blocks added by the plugin.

If you want the full TARDIS experience in Minecraft then you'll want to download and use this resource pack.

[Resource packs on the TARDIS plugin wiki](https://tardis.pages.dev/resource-packs)
